reviews.review_description:
I’m not biased😨😨 but this game is better than gtag!!!

Tbh Houndish worked AMAZINGLY well on this game, even before I was involved it was so fun to play, if you happen to join a lobby with someone then yourgonna have a good time! New updates come out  at least once evry two months I assume but you’ll enjoy it! So go get spookey monkeh🤑🤑🤑

reviews.review_title: This is an amazinggame Congrats houndish
reviews.review_description:
If any of you have read this do not not download the game because this is what I think you guys can make your own opinion on the game you don’t have to go for that I said the people who want to download the game and this game is an amazing game so you should most definitely go try it out and it was very well made￼

The game is amazing but the glass bridge level is kind of buggy because of the fact that all of the tiles disappear like this one time I was on top of one of the tiles for like maybe a few seconds and just randomly disappeared so then I was like maybe that was the wrong one so then I went to the other one and now it disappeared way faster and then I went and skip that one and both of those ones are wrong so I had to skip that one and go to the next one it finally held me And then when I tried to go to the next one after that one none of those ones held me so then I decided to go for the next ones do not hold me none of them and then I want for the next one do not hold me and then And finally at the fifth jump forwards it finally held me and it was like a really long jump for some reason and then another area where my friend made it finally because it was like a maybe 9 block jump to the side so it was all so after my friend made that jump like the sixth time it just disappeared it made it so it’s physically impossible to make And also I’m pretty sure it’s a level three or level four I can’t exactly remember But the lava cave the monsters are like kind of fast but not too too fast but they do start to speed up a lot after moving for a little bit but their site of vision is really small I feel like because like and also that AI is kind of weird because they just stand still if they don’t see nothing or see anybody or there’s nothing in there off box of like they’re iRange I guess and also it’s level three is the end and inside that like weird silver box If that is the end are you able to maybe add a text to say that it is the end￼ And then say next level coming soon￼ ￼

developer_response.body: thanks for your feed back! about glass bridge thing i don't know why that happened, from the plenty of times i play tested the game not once did that happened. maybe it was your internet being bad or something like that cuz i do know that the glass bridge in linked with photon and that needs internet. about the lev 3 monsters, there range is really small and i do fix that in the next update, i will also add a way to beat lev 3.

reviews.review_description: I think it is okay but the 2nd level you can’t outrun the monster and for new players that did’t watch your vids on the game, it might be confusing on how to beat the levels. You should add a content creator badge. Don’t make it were you have to have subs in the thousands pls

developer_response.body: hi, houndish here, thank you for your feed back! i agree about level 2, the map is small and there's not much space for the monster to run around, to make it so its a bit less confusing i can add something like big scary, for content creator badges i think i will add three different tiers. thanks for writing the first review!

reviews.review_description: Great for someone that loves the Gorilla Tag Locomotion! One of the best Gorilla Tag horror fan games I've played so far!! I love the minigames, levels, cosmetics, and decorations! I will show this to everyone I know now. 😼😼 Thanks Houndish for making an amazing game! ( and Toby)
